category_sources: source_facts.description says tools for working with SAM/BAM data; official GitHub README says Sambamba works with SAM and BAM files and implements view, index, sort, markdup, and depth.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is sambamba; official documentation and GitHub README use Sambamba/SAMBAMBA.
docs_sources: Official GitHub Pages documentation has Sambamba command reference pages and links back to source code on GitHub.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/biod/sambamba; per instruction repo is returned as null.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies SAM/BAM data; official README describes high-performance work with SAM/BAM sequencing files.
